purpose: Baseline before loading full AES export (~62,891) and declarations database (~50,000). Rerun with identical case IDs for diff.

memory_footprint.notes: legacy_overhead measured locally from translation_init RSS delta (~262 MB). Merged freight+intrastat typically fits Render Starter after cleanup.

metric_definitions.success: classification_state == SUGGEST and suggested_cn is not null
metric_definitions.aes_usage: historical_evidence_count > 0 OR historical_validation_applied OR AES validation bonus in top explanation OR historical:* keyword
metric_definitions.industrial_lexicon_used: description matches phrase in generated_industrial_lexicon.json (phrase-level signal)
metric_definitions.brand_knowledge_used: known brand in description AND brand signal in response (Entities brand= or brand:* keyword)
